stemHtml: What is the key difference between EU Regulation No. 376/2014 and EU Regulation No. 996/2010?

options.a: 376/2014 focuses on occurrence reporting, analysis, and follow-up actions; 996/2010 focuses on safety investigations into accidents and serious incidents.
options.b: 376/2014 focuses on 'safe culture'; 996/2010 focuses on 'just culture'.
options.c: 376/2014 focuses on occurrence reporting; 996/2010 focuses on investigations of accidents and incidents (including non-serious).
options.d: 376/2014 is a detailed directive on immediate actions and legal framework; 996/2010 focuses on safety investigations.
